text: Now let me compute which services are hot and get the PagerDuty triggered incidents.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":"(def sentry-by-project (group-by :project sentry-all))\n(def project-counts (map (fn [[p issues]] [p (count issues)]) sentry-by-project))\n(sort-by second > project-counts)"}

text: Good — we have 4 hot services. Let me get the triggered PagerDuty incidents for those services.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
